extract: Sandslash (Japanese: サンドパン Sandpan) is a Ground-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Sandshrew starting at level 22. In Alola, Sandslash has a dual-type Ice/Steel regional form. It evolves from Alolan Sandshrew when exposed to an Ice Stone. These Sandslash can also be found in Blueberry Academy's Terarium.
